roadmap.Task / Step: Finalize hardware selection and pinout
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Approved Rev A scope, exact prototype BOM, ESP32-S3 pin map and schematic-level connections are frozen; K-line hardware is included with a physical TX-disable
roadmap.Notes: The scope portion is approved in R-001_Rev_A_Scope_Requirements.docx. Complete this package by selecting exact breakout boards and documenting the final wiring/pinout.

roadmap.Task / Step: Wire and electrically verify the prototype
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Complete prototype matches the frozen pinout; continuity, shorts, grounds, 5 V and 3.3 V rails are verified; every module passes basic detection
roadmap.Notes: Install the K-line circuit but leave the motorcycle connector unplugged and the physical TX-enable jumper removed. Upload wiring photos and measured voltages.

roadmap.Task / Step: Define firmware and ride-data structure
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Firmware modules, common timestamp, ride and event records, sample rates, validity flags, state machine, file naming, configuration and failure behavior are documented before implementation
roadmap.Notes: microSD remains the authoritative recorder. Phone or GPS disconnects must not stop the core logger. K-line is represented as a disabled future module.

roadmap.Task / Step: Build and validate the firmware foundation
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: ESP32-S3 programs reliably, restarts cleanly, reports errors, uses the documented pin configuration and runs a stable timed acquisition loop
roadmap.Notes: Validate the controller foundation before implementing individual sensor drivers. K-line firmware remains disabled.

roadmap.Task / Step: Bring up and calibrate the IMU
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: ICM-42688-P records stable accelerometer and gyroscope data at 100–200 Hz with mounting orientation documented

roadmap.Task / Step: Build reliable microSD logging
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Timestamped ride file survives start, stop, restart and normal power removal without corruption

roadmap.Task / Step: Bring up u-blox M10 GNSS
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Position, time, speed, altitude and fix quality are recorded at the selected stable rate

roadmap.Task / Step: Synchronize GPS, IMU and device status
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: One continuous log uses a common monotonic timeline and flags missing or stale values

roadmap.Task / Step: Add simple BLE ride controls and live status
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Phone can start/stop a ride and view GPS lock, recording state, storage state and live pitch without interrupting microSD logging
roadmap.Notes: No dedicated display is required; PV3 remains the engine-data screen

roadmap.Task / Step: Complete a one-hour stationary logger test
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: No crashes, corrupt files, timing gaps or unacceptable sensor drift during one continuous hour

roadmap.Task / Step: Mount the USB-powered prototype safely
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Rigid temporary enclosure and antenna mount pass steering, heat, vibration, water and retention inspection

roadmap.Task / Step: Record and review the first controlled ride
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: GPS route, speed, IMU and device status are complete and correctly aligned throughout the ride

roadmap.Task / Step: Implement wheelie and ride-event detection
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Controlled tests identify wheelie start, duration and maximum pitch with manually reviewed false positives

roadmap.Task / Step: Build the first post-ride viewer
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Ride route, speed, pitch, acceleration and detected events can be reviewed from a saved log

roadmap.Task / Step: Bench-test the L9637D interface
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Protected 12 V K-line circuit receives simulated traffic; ESP logic levels are verified; hardware TX-disable is proven

roadmap.Task / Step: Build and verify the Honda diagnostic Y-harness
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Pinout, continuity, polarity and pass-through operation are verified without modifying the factory harness

roadmap.Task / Step: Capture Honda/PV3 traffic with TX disabled
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Repeatable K-line captures are recorded while the physical TX jumper remains removed

roadmap.Task / Step: Decode and validate useful Honda channels
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Available RPM, TPS, temperature, voltage and diagnostic values are cross-checked against PV3 readings

roadmap.Task / Step: Add validated Honda data to the ride log
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Honda channels share the GPS/IMU timeline without degrading standalone logging reliability

roadmap.Task / Step: Add protected motorcycle power
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Logger operates across the defined motorcycle supply range and passes reverse-polarity and restart tests

roadmap.Task / Step: Design a custom PCB and sealed enclosure
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: Validated prototype circuit is converted to a serviceable motorcycle-ready assembly

roadmap.Task / Step: Review deferred expansion features
roadmap.Deliverable / Exit Criteria: BMW CAN, suspension sensing, wheel sensors, dedicated display, wideband and quickshifter are reconsidered only after the Honda logger is stable
